scripts.test: tsc --project scripts/tsconfig.assertions.json && mkdir -p /tmp/htya-assertion-tests/node_modules/@ && ln -sfn /tmp/htya-assertion-tests/src/lib /tmp/htya-assertion-tests/node_modules/@/lib && node /tmp/htya-assertion-tests/scripts/check-senior-match-orders.js && node /tmp/htya-assertion-tests/scripts/check-team-spirit-simulation.js
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run check:i18n && npm run check:chpp-permissions && npm run check:readme-version && npm run check:audit && next build
